steps.t: Malbír has asked you to look for signs of his missing friend, Gúrayin, who was last seen heading north of Zarsatrâd.
While searching for Gúrayin in Lower Lebennin's forest, you came across some dwarf-sized footprints. You should continue to follow the footprints and …
At the foot of a snowy mountainside you found a scrap of blue fabric. You should investigate the fabric. The fabric is in Lower Lebennin, north of Zar…
As you leaned in to examine the scrap of blue fabric, a terrible beast roared and rushed forward to attack! You are sure that Gúrayin did not survive …
